modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Students unable to add notes to Panopto videos.

full_description_text: 
I was trying to figure out how students can add their own notes while watching a Panopto video. It seems like there’s no clear way to do this, and I’m not sure if I’m missing something. I just want to know how they can make their own notes, you know? It’s really confusing and I thought it would be easier.
